title: I Protect Myself Against My Enemies

sources.title: 1968 - I Protect Myself Against My Enemies - Spaghetti Western
sources.description:
Cowboy Alan Burton (Charles Southwood) is on a dusty quest for Confederate gold! After a mysterious major gives him a silver dollar with a hidden clue, Alan teams up with quick-draw sidekick Hondo (Julián Mateos) to outsmart bandits, dodge double-crosses, and crack the code to a legendary treasure. Saddle up for shootouts, secret maps, and frontier thrills!

CREDITS
🎬 Directed by: Mario Amendola
⭐ Starring: Charles Southwood, Julián Mateos, Alida Chelli, Mirko Ellis, Ivano Staccioli
🎵 Music: Carlo Rustichelli
🎞️ Cinematography: Aldo Giordani

FILM DETAILS
Original Title: Dai nemici mi guardo io! (1968) AKA: Three Silver Dollars
Genre: Spaghetti Western, Drama, Romance
Country: Italy 
Release date: August 16, 1968

metadata.Plot: A few people are on the search of three one Dollar coins with numbers that Show where a treasure is burried.
metadata.Actors: Charles Southwood, Julián Mateos, Alida Chelli
